hooks.command: EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.end", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64), response: (.tool_response | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node ./.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node ./.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c -n --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID" --arg dir "$(pwd)" '{ts: $ts, event: "session.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: $sid, data: {directory: $dir}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node ./.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)
